main_use: Identify candidate publications and study context

search_role: Validate run accessions, library layout, platform, and file availability

search_role: Check organism, body site, health status, and sample attributes

main_use: Confirm sample annotations and accession mappings
search_role: Review sample tables, phenotype metadata, and study documentation

main_use: Provide additional INSDC sequence archive coverage
notes: Useful for broader international archive awareness

main_use: Identify curated studies or processed datasets
